description: A customer needs to change the dates of their existing hotel reservation, moving it one week later.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the existing reservation using the confirmation number.
Check for availability for the same room type for the new dates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the room is available for the new dates.

nodes.task_description: Update the reservation with the new dates and inform the customer of any price difference.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully modifies the booking and communicates the new total.
